target:
(A girl with blonde hair and blue eyes named Ushio
stood out physically and
was often teased by troublemakers)

(But Ushio would stand up to those kids
and fight back with her fists…)

Thanks, Shinpei!
Because of you, I got a chance to fight back!

S-so… I didn't mean to…
you know…

Because I was being teased,
you wanted to help, right?

You…
Don't do dangerous things anymore, okay?
